title: mammea woodii
intro: Mammea woodii, also known as the African star apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mammea woodii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
